# Code Style And Conventions

Repository style rules:

- format with Pint
- keep PHP-CS-Fixer secondary and non-conflicting with Pint
- keep imports explicit and ordered by formatter output
- prefer descriptive method names matching existing response helper terminology
- preserve existing response-envelope naming and default key semantics
- keep markdown concise and section-oriented
- do not leave warnings, notices, risky tests, or ignored failures
